title: ANCHOR
subtitle: A TRIBUTE TO MY FATHER
text:
You're my truth, my life,
my beginning, my end.
You know my weaknesses and flaws,
yet you're my buddy and my friend.

This relation is not only of blood,
but of emotions and linked hearts too.
Among all the bonds I've ever known,
you're a part of me, I'm a part of you.

As love has no age limit,
that's why my love for you stays true.
Your morals and your way of seeing life
have taught me something new.

Words are too few to describe you,
even calamities fear facing you.
You're present in my every breath,
and I know what you truly mean to me.

title:
SPORTSMAN
SPIRIT
subtitle: THE SPIRIT OF EXCELLENCE
text:
Ignite your fire.
Learn from every downfall,
Bouncers will come and go,
Don't fear the pavilion's call.

Never get upset,
Face every yorker,
Build your own present,
Your ace will be your marker.

Sometimes a hundred,
Sometimes a duck,
Give your best always,
And leave the rest to luck.

The past is your best teacher,
The future, an unseen creature,
Spread your wings in the present sky,
Every great score begins with a try.

title:
FRACTAL
DREAMS
subtitle: WHERE MATHS MEETS CREATIVITY
text:
The world of signs,
The verse of puzzles.
Relies on infinite shapes,
That's why geometry hustles.

Someone's stress reliever,
Someone's tensed summon.
Infinite wonders in every pixel,
One who never starts is already undone.

The battle is between mindset,
And a little about equations.
The one who never gives up,
Becomes the master of all summations.

Shapes from the dispenser,
Innovation within a single line.
Though the theory stays unknown,
Creativity makes one shine.
